metadata.title: O Come, All Ye Faithful
metadata.subtitle: Adeste Fideles — English (Frederick Oakeley, 1841)
metadata.lyricist: John Francis Wade (Latin, 1751); English translation by Frederick Oakeley (1802–1880)
metadata.x_pd_basis: Wade's Latin original (d. 1786) and Oakeley's English translation (d. 1880) are PD by > 140 years
metadata.x_translator: Frederick Oakeley (English) — paired with 神の御子は今宵しも (Japanese)
